commands.purpose: Table view of attendance records filtered by tenant / session / athlete / branch / status / date range.
Scriptable manual check-in for an athlete on a session. Defaults to checked_in_via='admin_recorded'. Consumes a Pass if session.requires_pass=true. Dry-run mode simulates without committing.
Set checked_out_at on an attendance record with optional left_early_reason.
Cancel an accidental check-in. Refunds consumed Pass atomically. Requires --reason.
Aggregate attendance report — attendance rate, absence patterns, late-arrival trends. Requires attendance_analytics entitlement.
List attendance policies with specificity indicator (plan-scoped / branch-scoped / tenant-wide).
Scaffolded policy creation with sensible defaults from data/policy-template-samples.json.
Flip is_active false → true. Refuses composite active-policy collision at same (branch, plan) specificity.
Scriptable absence report — guardian self-report OR admin recording an absence.
Flip status unexcused → excused. Re-runs threshold check (may undo prior freeze).
Manual sweep of the rolling-window absence check. --all iterates every athlete with active enrollment; --athlete=ath_... checks one athlete.
One-shot invocation of ReconcileAttendanceJob for a specific session, tenant, or date. --dry-run reports what would be created without committing.
